lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Kestrel Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Anti-Xeno weapons
sources.what: Reference for Guardian Gauss Cannons, Enhanced AX Multi-Cannons, and the Guardian/AX module set used in this build.

sources.label: Fandom wiki — Thargoid combat
sources.what: Anti-Xeno tactics, Interceptor heart mechanics, caustic damage, and Guardian weapon behaviour.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: Anti-Xeno fitting and Interceptor tactics covering Gauss placement, heat management and heart-cracking.
